overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character moves from under an overpass through a bustling commercial district with towering digital billboards, then turns into a narrower street beneath another overpass.

events.description: emerging from under the dark overpass into the open commercial district with visible sky
ambient light increases as camera moves out from under the overpass shadow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete pavement beneath the overpass, heading toward the illuminated commercial district ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars creating a covered walkway
metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from the multi-lane road
tall building covered in multiple layers of glowing digital advertisements and neon signage
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a sheltered, narrow walkway. The pavement is wet and reflective. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from the shadow into a brighter open area, revealing towering digital billboards and futuristic buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with holographic advertising towers

events.description: crowd density increases significantly as character enters the busy commercial district
character slightly adjusts walking path to navigate through denser pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling commercial boulevard, navigating between pedestrians while passing towering holographic advertisements and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and cap walking alongside the character

entered.detail: large vertical holographic display showing a pink/purple humanoid figure
tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard
tall building with reflective glass windows and corporate signage
storefronts with awnings and illuminated signs at street level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide commercial boulevard bathed in neon light from massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. Palm trees line the left side while crowds of pedestrians fill the walkway. The character moves through moderate foot traffic past glass office towers and ground-level shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and overpass ramps

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection, navigating between vehicles
character begins turning left toward the underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while avoiding vehicles, then turning left toward a darker underpass area

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt road surface
concrete ramp structure leading up to the elevated highway
open paved area at the intersection with drainage grates

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection with marked crosswalks, crossing between moving vehicles. The digital billboard tower remains visible to the left while the character turns away from the main commercial strip toward a concrete overpass ramp on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under industrial overpass with utility infrastructure

events.description: entering the darker covered area beneath the concrete overpass
ambient light drops significantly, becoming dependent on artificial street lighting and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass through a narrower corridor with industrial elements, fewer pedestrians, and parked vehicles

entered.detail: underside of the highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect
large orange utility pipes running along the wall
wide staircase leading up to an upper level or building entrance
wall with large 'VOTE' political posters and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, enclosed space beneath a concrete overpass. The environment shifts to industrial with orange utility pipes, concrete stairs, and political posters on the walls. Lighting becomes artificial and moody, with fewer pedestrians and parked cars lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass into a vibrant neon commercial district before descending back into a moody industrial zone. It begins in a narrow, wet walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, moving forward as the shadows give way to a bright open area filled with towering digital billboards. The scene then expands into a wide boulevard bathed in holographic light, where the camera glides past palm trees and crowds of pedestrians between glass office towers. As the character crosses a busy intersection of moving vehicles, the perspective turns away from the main commercial strip toward a concrete ramp. Finally, the environment shifts back into a darker, enclosed space beneath another overpass, where the neon glow is replaced by artificial lighting, orange utility pipes, and weathered political posters.
